name: Biology Hour [Beastars Orgy]
description:
"Shhhhh!!! Don't. Make. A. Sound... I just stumbled upon something... Interesting..."

It's just another day at Cherryton University. The sun in shining, the flowers are blooming... God, days like this are meant for walking. And that's what you decided to do to keep yourself from being bored out of your mind on a Saturday afternoon.

You take your usual route, starting at the fountain and making your way around the grounds, stopping to attempt to get a peak inside the drama club building and see what they've got planned for the play this semester (to no avail). As you get to around the midpoint of the walk, where you usually walk through the gardening club and give Haru a wave, you spot Sheila of all people...

Alright I decided to give y'all something to play with after just giving y'all a lame update bot after dipping for 4 days. I was actually writing the part about having an idea for biology hour and it just clicked for me, so yeah have some more fun with Meesh drawn smut.

Made it so Cherryton is a university instead of a highschool-ish thing, and even then the characters are in their second year or something like that (Watched the show when S2 came out, and I roughly know the plot but its been a while). Gonna be a furry only bot (I mean you can try being human, just know that in Beastars humans aren't a thing. Just be an ape) Don't expect a roleplay that lasts in quality past the orgy, it may be 2000 total tokens but it is not detailed enough for a faithful rpg or anything although feel free I suppose.

Warning: bot contains many tokens and characters, so it will probably end up making a mistake in a response or two and either switch genders or just generally get mixed up. I tried to keep count down by shit happens, edit and/or Regen.

Art by the lovely Meesh

And as always, I hope ye enjoy...
creator: Apothecary123
